positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos
% SZS output start Proof for pos
2. netflix_show(stranger_things) [input(axiom)]
3. popular(stranger_things) [input(axiom)]
6. ! [X0] : ((netflix_show(X0) & popular(X0)) => binge(X0)) [input(axiom)]
8. ! [X0] : ((netflix_show(X0) & binge(X0)) => share(X0)) [input(axiom)]
9. share(stranger_things) [input(conjecture)]
10. ~share(stranger_things) [negated conjecture 9]
11. ~share(stranger_things) [flattening 10]
12. ! [X0] : (binge(X0) | (~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0))) [ennf transformation 6]
13. ! [X0] : (binge(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0)) [flattening 12]
14. ! [X0] : (share(X0) | (~netflix_show(X0) | ~binge(X0))) [ennf transformation 8]
15. ! [X0] : (share(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~binge(X0)) [flattening 14]
18. netflix_show(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 2]
19. popular(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 3]
22. ~popular(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | binge(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
25. ~binge(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | share(X0) [cnf transformation 15]
26. ~share(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 11]
27. ~netflix_show(stranger_things) | binge(stranger_things) [resolution 22,19]
28. binge(stranger_things) [forward subsumption resolution 27,18]
29. ~netflix_show(stranger_things) | share(stranger_things) [resolution 28,25]
31. share(stranger_things) [forward subsumption resolution 29,18]
32. $false [forward subsumption resolution 31,26]
% SZS output end Proof for pos
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    popular(stranger_things)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~popular(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | binge(X0)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~download(black_mirror)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~binge(X0) | download(X0)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    download(stranger_things)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    binge(stranger_things)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    netflix_show(stranger_things)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    stranger_things != black_mirror).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    netflix_show(black_mirror)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all groundings,
    whenever download(X0) is true, set binge(X0) to true
for all inputs,
    define share(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
